title: Watch Sudan Archives Cover Sade For XMU
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Last year, Sudan Archives returned with her latest record The BPM, which we named one of the best albums of 2025. Now, Brittney Parks is back with a cover of Sade's 1992 song "Cherish The Day" for SiriusXMU.

The post Watch Sudan Archives Cover Sade For XMU appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last year, Sudan Archives returned with her latest record The BPM, which we named one of the best albums of 2025. Now, Brittney Parks is back with a cover of Sade's 1992 song "Cherish The Day" for SiriusXMU.

The futuristic artist took liberty with the Love Deluxe track. Armed with eloquent violin and mesmeric AutoTune, she used the original lyrics as mere suggestions and let the song flow into a dreamy state as she stretched out the line "You show me how deep love can be." Quickly the repetition of the word "deep" turned into just a pleasant buzz amongst the sonic flourish. Watch below.
